items.speaker: Polmes
items.text: As reliable as ever, Passenger! You've managed to bring back all the Namipons!

items.speaker: Polmes
items.text: Gathering all the lost capybaras in such a short time… You're truly the greatest detective in all of Honami!

items.speaker: Polmes
items.text: Haha, with so many <ano=Little Namipons><te href=851073>Missing Namipons</te>s</ano> here, this place feels more bustling than ever.

options.text: That's how a cafe should be.
Maybe they could keep their voices down a little.

items.speaker: Polmes
items.text: Indeed. I love a lively crowd myself as well.

items.speaker: Polmes
items.text: There's no need to worry. Every Namipon's a good Namipon. We'd never cause any trouble.

items.speaker: Polmes
items.text: Thanks to your help, "we" are reunited once again, ready to make Honami City a better place.

items.speaker: Polmes
items.text: I look forward to us working together again! Be it chasing urban legends or solving cold cases, you'll always have my full support.

items.speaker: Polmes
items.text: Wherever there's a case, there's a detective! The Super Detective Team will always be on the frontline in pursuit of truth.
